template:
**DOCUMENT FORMAT — SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND RELEASE**:
Formal agreement resolving legal claims between parties.

STRUCTURE:
1. TITLE: "SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND GENERAL RELEASE"
2. PREAMBLE: Date, parties with full legal names, recitals describing the dispute
3. SETTLEMENT AMOUNT: Specific dollar amount, payment method, timeline
4. RELEASE: Broad release of all claims, known and unknown, arising from the dispute
5. DISMISSAL: Agreement to dismiss pending action with prejudice within specified timeframe
6. CONFIDENTIALITY: Non-disclosure of settlement terms (if applicable)
7. NO ADMISSION: Neither party admits liability
8. REPRESENTATIONS: Authority to sign, no prior assignment of claims
9. GENERAL PROVISIONS: Governing law, entire agreement, amendments, severability
10. SIGNATURE BLOCKS: All parties, with witness/notary if required

TONE: Neutral, precise. Both parties' interests balanced.
INCLUDE specific dollar amounts from case data if available.
hints: Key elements to address: settlement amount, payment terms, release scope, confidentiality, dismissal with prejudice.
